title: Lummus Technology and Advanced Ionics Break Ground on Green Hydrogen Pilot Plant
content: Lummus Technology and Advanced Ionics recently broke ground on a pilot plant for Advanced Ionicsâ€™ cutting-edge electrolyzer technology at Lummus Technologyâ€™s R&D facility in Pasadena, Texas. This project represents the next phase of their partnership to accelerate the availability of cost-effective green hydrogen. Lummus will operate the electrolyzer and manage the balance of plant systems, leveraging its proven track record of developing breakthrough technologies. Advanced Ionics will provide its innovative electrolyzer, designed to deliver high-efficiency hydrogen production with reduced energy requirements. This milestone proves that green hydrogen can be practical and economically viable, marking another key step toward commercial deployment. The pilot builds on a partnership established in 2024 to advance the production and commercialization of sustainable hydrogen technology, widely recognized as a key enabler for decarbonizing industrial processes, transportation, and power generation.
author: Analysts Account
